subject: FILIPINO
title: Wastong Pagbabaybay
objective: Bumuo at baybayin nang wasto ang mga pamilyar na salita.
introduction: Iugnay ang tunog, pantig, kahulugan, at ayos ng mga letra. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Wastong Pagbabaybay”.
A key word used in the lesson “Wastong Pagbabaybay”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Iugnay ang tunog, pantig, kahulugan, at ayos ng mga letra.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Iugnay ang tunog, pantig, kahulugan, at ayos ng mga letra.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. hamaanl and hlmn do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Wastong Pagbabaybay”?

options.text: Iugnay ang tunog, pantig, kahulugan, at ayos ng mga letra.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Iugnay ang tunog, pantig, kahulugan, at ayos ng mga letra.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Iugnay ang tunog, pantig, kahulugan, at ayos ng mga letra.
The correct response is “ba-hay—bahay” because it follows the lesson explanation: Iugnay ang tunog, pantig, kahulugan, at ayos ng mga letra.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?
items.explanation: The correct response is “bhy para sa bahay” because it follows the lesson explanation: Iugnay ang tunog, pantig, kahulugan, at ayos ng mga letra.
The correct response is “halaman” because it follows the lesson explanation: Iugnay ang tunog, pantig, kahulugan, at ayos ng mga letra.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?
items.explanation: The correct response is “ha-la-man—halaman” because it follows the lesson explanation: Iugnay ang tunog, pantig, kahulugan, at ayos ng mga letra.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Wastong Pagbabaybay; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Wastong Pagbabaybay.
